en.name: Level 9 — The Suburbs
en.shortDescription: An infinite midnight suburb of furnished houses and deadly streets, resource-bearing but swarming with hostile entities.
en.atmosphere: A neighborhood frozen at night: fog, dead trees, static-like mental interference and a pervasive sense of being watched.
en.tips: Avoid the entity-spawning fog. Keep to sidewalks and roads. Loot houses warily and follow arrow signs toward Level 11.
